title: Fix booking submissions end-to-end: frontend query hook and admin display

requirements.summary: Rewrite useGetAllSubmissions hook to call getAllSubmissions backend query using anonymous actor
acceptanceCriteria: useGetAllSubmissions calls actor.getAllSubmissions() using an anonymous actor
The hook runs automatically on mount without requiring login
Returned data is correctly typed and mapped to the submission record shape
Empty array is handled gracefully (shows empty state, no crash)
Populated array is surfaced to the component as an array of submission objects

file_operations.description: Rewrite useGetAllSubmissions hook to call the backend getAllSubmissions query method using an anonymous actor (no authentication required). Ensure the hook returns typed BookingSubmission[] data from backend.d.ts, runs automatically on mount, handles empty arrays gracefully, and does not depend on Internet Identity login status. The query should be enabled immediately and use queryKey ['allSubmissions'].

requirements.summary: Update AdminPage to consume useGetAllSubmissions hook and render all submission records as styled cards
acceptanceCriteria: Admin page at /admin loads immediately without any login prompt or auth gate
All stored booking submissions are displayed as cards with all 9 fields visible
A loading spinner or skeleton is shown while submissions are being fetched
An error message is displayed if the fetch fails
An empty-state message is shown when there are no submissions
Page styling matches the site's black and neon green palette

file_operations.description: Update AdminPage to consume the fixed useGetAllSubmissions hook and render all returned BookingSubmission records as styled cards. Each card must display all 9 fields: id, name, email, phone, eventType, eventDate, venue, guestCount, additionalDetails, and submittedAt timestamp. Remove any authentication checks or login gates entirely. Show a loading spinner (using shadcn/ui components) while the query is in flight. Show a clear error message if the query fails. Show an empty-state message when no submissions exist. Apply glassmorphism card styling consistent with the site's black and neon green (#39FF14) theme from tailwind.config.js. Keep the existing logout and refresh controls but ensure the page loads all data without requiring login.

requirements.summary: Ensure BookingForm uses useSubmitForm mutation correctly with clear success and error feedback
acceptanceCriteria: Submitting the booking form calls submitBooking on the backend with all 8 fields
A success confirmation message is displayed after a successful submission
The form resets after a successful submission
An error message is displayed if the submission fails, preserving form data
The mutation uses an anonymous actor so no login is required to submit

file_operations.description: Verify and ensure useSubmitForm mutation hook calls backend submitBooking with all 8 required fields (name, email, phone, eventType, eventDate, venue, guestCount, additionalDetails) using an anonymous actor. The mutation should handle the SubmissionResult return type from backend.d.ts correctly, exposing success/error states to the component. Ensure no authentication is required for form submission.

Ensure BookingForm correctly uses the useSubmitForm mutation hook and displays clear success and error feedback after submission. On successful submission (mutation.isSuccess), show a confirmation message (using alert, toast, or inline message) and reset the form fields. On error (mutation.isError), display an error message without losing the entered data. Ensure all 8 fields are passed to the mutation: name, email, phone, eventType, eventDate, venue, guestCount, additionalDetails. The submission must work without requiring Internet Identity login.
